claim: Missing cell stack; comm timeout is a symptom.

proposedActions.instruction: Set bench PSU CH1 to 30.0 V, 0.5 A limit, across the cell-sim ladder (J3).
proposedActions.rationale: Apply the emulated cell stack so the AFE wakes.
Confirm the wake sequence requires a cell stack.

rationale: Only VIO is wired; per datasheet §7 the AFE needs the stack to wake.
